item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 42min Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The mom
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 42min Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 1 1 19 1 mil

item.title: Drakesport: Fitzwilliam reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins.
item.description: Fitzwilliam reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 75 41 833 67 mil

item.title: BetfairExchange: Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 1h The Champions League winner will be... Bayern @ 2.92 Arsenal
item.description: Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 1h The Champions League winner will be... Bayern @ 2.92 Arsenal @ 3.55 PSG @ 3.85 Atleti @ 8.6 63 votos · 22 horas restantes 1 1 2 1 mil
